data.description: MONEY MARKETS PRICE IN 40% CHANCE OF ECB RATE CUT BY DECEMBER FROM AROUND 30% BEFORE US DATA

data.title: Figure Technology Solutions (Nasdaq: FIGR) reveals preliminary unaudited financial results for Q4 2025 & full year; files Form S-1.
data.description: On February 13, 2026, Figure Technology Solutions (Nasdaq: FIGR), a prominent blockchain-focused capital marketplace facilitating the creation, financing, exchange, and trading of tokenized assets, revealed initial unaudited financial figures for the fourth quarter and entirety of 2025. Alongside this disclosure, they submitted a registration document on Form S-1 encompassing preliminary operational outcomes for the corresponding periods.

data.title: Moderna stock surged after strong Q4 sales and maintaining 2026 outlook despite recent FDA setbacks.
data.description: Shares of Moderna saw a surge in value on Friday following the announcement of stronger-than-anticipated fourth-quarter sales numbers, along with the reiteration of their future outlook for 2026. Despite some recent setbacks with the FDA, the company's stock experienced a positive uptick.

data.title: DraftKings plunges after weak Q4 results, lower guidance, and missed user numbers. Cathie Wood of ARK Invest sells DKNG shares, buys crypto stocks.
data.description: DraftKings stock plummeted after issuing guidance numbers below expectations and falling short on user metrics. Renowned investor Cathie Wood's firm, ARK Invest, decided to sell DKNG shares while simultaneously acquiring positions in cryptocurrency stocks. This news saw DraftKings' shares tanking post their Q4 results, with Cathie Wood further unloading more shares amidst the turmoil.

data.title: AI stocks facing disruption concerns; top-performing ones from last year pulling back. Market shift evident.
data.description: Concerns about the impact of AI disruption have led to a shift in the market. Several top AI stocks, which saw significant gains last year, have experienced a decline. Despite this, some stocks have continued to perform well this week, showing resilience amidst the disruptions.

data.title: Trump considering reducing aluminum and steel tariffs. Industry stocks reacted positively on Friday.
data.description: On Friday, there was a report about President Donald Trump considering a reduction in aluminum and steel tariffs. As a result, certain industry stocks saw a positive response. This news was covered on Investor's Business Daily, indicating a potential shift in the market with significant implications for the companies involved.

data.title: Core CPI inflation rate at lowest level since early 2021, may impact Fed's decisions. S&P 500 remains stable.
data.description: The latest data shows that the core Consumer Price Index (CPI) inflation rate has dropped to its lowest point since the beginning of 2021. This decline in the core CPI inflation rate may cause the Federal Reserve to be less vigilant. In addition, the S&P 500 has stabilized amidst this news.

data.title: Coinbase misses Q4 estimates due to bear market, but shares rebounding.
data.description: On Thursday, Coinbase reported Q4 results that fell short of estimates amid a downturn in the digital asset market. Despite this setback, the crypto exchange is currently experiencing a rebound in shares.

data.title: Moldova celebrates 25 years of National Wine Day - showcasing global wine ambitions; highlights country's unique identity.
data.description: On February 13, 2026, in Chisinau, Moldova, the nation celebrated its annual National Wine Day, a unique event that highlights the country's deep connection to wine as a core part of its identity. Moldova stands out as one of the few places globally that dedicates a national holiday to celebrating wine. This year's festivities showcased the country's rich winemaking heritage and attracted thousands of visitors. National Wine Day is a key event for Moldova, emphasizing its status as a prominent wine-producing nation.

data.title: UBS Group AG has notified Bang & Olufsen A/S as a major shareholder, in accordance with Danish Capital Markets Act.
data.description: Bang & Olufsen A/S has recently been notified by UBS Group AG, a major shareholder, as per the Danish Capital Markets Act.
The US removes document that listed firms linked to the Chinese military.

data.title: Cementos Pacasmayo's Q4 EPS misses estimates by -218%, revenue up $25.05M. Investors take note!
data.description: Cementos Pacasmayo (NYSE: CPAC) disclosed its Q4 earnings on February 13, 2026, at 06:12 AM. The financial update revealed that the company fell short of expected earnings by -218.0%, with an EPS of $-0.059 compared to the projected $0.05. Revenue saw a rise of $25.05 million in comparison to the previous quarter. For more details, the complete report can be found on Benzinga.com.
Millicom (Tigo) announces Q4 2025 results and video call. Stay tuned for updates on the important event.
Musk's bankers are discussing a plan to address xAI debt after the merger.

data.title: Nootropics Depot sets market record with highest potency saffron extract, correcting previous news release.
data.description: Nootropics Depot has achieved a significant milestone in the market with the launch of its highest potency Saffron Extract on 16-Sep-2025. The company has set a new record with this product, showcasing its commitment to innovation and excellence. This extract boasts an impressive potency level, setting it apart from other products currently available. The achievement highlights Nootropics Depot's dedication to pushing boundaries and providing top-quality supplements to consumers. Additional details regarding this groundbreaking product are provided at the end of the news release.

data.title: PLI to headline 4 sessions at India AI Impact Summit; advocating for pro-human AI, better digital governance.
data.description: Tomicah Tillemann, President of PLI, is set to collaborate with international allies to push for a human-centric AI framework, improved digital regulation, and personal user control. The organization will have a significant presence at the upcoming India AI Impact Summit, scheduled to take place in New York on February 13, 2026.

data.title: Cabot Properties acquires 220,608 sq ft modern logistics asset in Osaka, Japan (6,202 Tsubo) - 3-4-8 Shinmachi Nishi in Minoh City, Osaka.
data.description: Cabot Properties, a prominent investor, developer, and operator of logistics properties globally, has recently purchased a multi-story modern logistics warehouse in the Greater Osaka, Japan area. The acquired facility spans 220,608 square feet (equivalent to 6,202 Tsubo) and is located at 3-4-8 Shinmachi Nishi in Minoh City, Osaka. This acquisition marks Cabot's debut in Japan and aligns with their focus on investing in top-tier industrial assets.

data.title: Casago CEO Steve Schwab becomes Chairman of the Board, focusing on long-term strategy and franchise community. Schwab to remain CEO until October.
data.description: In Phoenix today, it was announced by Casago that CEO Steve Schwab will transition to a Founder and Chairman of the Board role, focusing on long-term strategy and industry advocacy within the expanding franchise community. Schwab will continue as CEO of Casago and Vacasa until October, when he will assume his new position. In collaboration with the Board of Directors, Schwab has outlined the plan for the transition.
